==Disclaimer==
{{Note|All gear can also be found in the [[Gear Forge]] unless it is obtained from:
*Beating an Enemy
*W-Tad Value Packs
*In-App Purchases/Real Money
}}
{{clear}}
== Realm ==

|-|White=

{{gearrow|Curator's Helmet|905|1,200|40|120|40|Enemies in explorations drop +16 W-tads<br>(Only when you are really lucky!)<br>Tadpoles Gained: 100,000|50k Museum Medals in [[Museum|Museum Shop]]|orange}}
{{gearrow|Iron Track|907|400|40|40|200|Travel SPD +6.4%|{{retext|Iron Track|purple}} + {{retext|Abyss Amulet|purple}} + {{retext|Icy Bracelet|purple}}|orange}}
{{gearrow|Diver|909|1,200|40|40|120|In any Realm, 2x Demon God Cells +8%|{{retext|Diver|purple}} + {{retext|Abyss Amulet|purple}} + {{retext|Icy Bracelet|purple}}|orange}}
{{gearrow|Gear Ring|911|400|40|40|200|When you enter a new area, gain +80 INTEL|Divine Order Chest (0.2% chance)|orange}}
|}
|-|Red=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Warmonger's Gun|100|600|180|60|180|In [[Koryeo]], Snail ATK +120<br>In [[Koryeo]], Snail RUSH +120<br>In [[Koryeo]], Snail DMG +12%<br>In [[Koryeo]], INTEL gained +12%|{{retext|Virgo Tech|orange}} + {{retext|Jung-geun's Gun|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Sword Futsuno|200|600|180|60|180|In [[Yamato]], Snail ATK +120<br>In [[Yamato]], Snail RUSH +120<br>In [[Yamato]], DMG +12%<br>In [[Yamato]], INTEL gained +12%|{{retext|Blade Murasame|orange}} + {{retext|Genji Armor|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Sky Piercer|300|600|180|60|180|In [[Cathay]], Snail ATK +120<br>In [[Cathay]], Snail RUSH +120<br>In [[Cathay]], DMG +12%<br>In [[Cathay]], INTEL gained +12%|{{retext|Conqueror Spear|orange}} + {{retext|Couple Swords|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Bullet Storm|400|600|180|60|180|In [[Murika]], Snail ATK +120<br>In [[Murika]], Snail RUSH +120<br>In [[Murika]], DMG +12%<br>In [[Murika]], INTEL gained +12%|{{retext|Indv. Power Armor|orange}} + {{retext|Indv. High-explosive Rifle|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Crown of Eternal Daylight|500|600|180|60|180|In [[Britland]], Snail ATK +150<br>In [[Britland]], Snail RUSH +150<br>In [[Britland]], DMG +12%<br>In [[Britland]], INTEL gained +12%<br>In [[Britland]], fleet cannon DMG +12%|{{retext|Lion's Crown|orange}} + {{retext|Windsor's Cape|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Lion King's Sword|600|600|180|60|180|In [[Kemet]], Snail ATK +150<br>In [[Kemet]], Snail RUSH +150<br>In [[Kemet]], Snail DMG +12%<br>In [[Kemet]], INTEL gained +12%|{{retext|Damascus Knife|orange}} + {{retext|Horse Helmet|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Athena's Spear|700|600|180|60|180|In [[Hellas]], Snail ATK +120<br>In [[Hellas]], Snail DEF +120<br>In [[Hellas]], DMG +12%<br>In [[Hellas]], INTEL gained +12%<br>Every Costume Stat +12%|{{retext|Stardust Arrow|orange}} + {{retext|Eternal Empire Staff|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Rama Greataxe|600|600|180|60|180|In [[Bharata]], Snail ATK +150<br>In [[Bharata]], Snail RUSH +150<br>In [[Bharata]], Snail DMG +12%<br>In [[Bharata]], INTEL gained +12%|{{retext|Ashoka's Sword|orange}} + {{retext|Indra's Crown|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Spacetime Exile|1011|600|180|60|180|In the [[Time Rift|Rift]], Snail ATK +150<br>In the [[Time Rift|Rift]], Snail RUSH +150<br>In the [[Time Rift|Rift]], DMG +12%<br>In the [[Time Rift|Rift]], INTEL gained +12% |{{RewardIconWithText|Eternal Return|orange}} + {{RewardIconWithText|Millennium Ring|orange}} |red}}
{{gearrow|Mithraic Bow & Spear|720|600|180|60|180|In [[Parsia]], ATK +150<br>In [[Parsia]], RUSH +150<br>In [[Parsia]], DMG +12%<br>in [[Parsia]], INTEL +12%|{{retext|Jade Spear|orange}} + {{retext|Arrow of Arash|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|The Great Scientist|902|1800|60|60|180|When exploring, 2x Time Chests Drops +12%|{{retext|Teslla|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Abyss Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Overlord's Hook|904|1,800|60|180|60|Enemies in exploration drop +120 B-tads<br>Tadpoles Gained: 3,200,000|{{retext|Pirate|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Abyss Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|The Great Collector|906|1,800|60|180|60|Enemies in exploration drop +24 W-tads<br>(Only when you are really lucky!)<br>Tadpoles Gained: 110,000|{{retext|Curator's Helm|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Abyss Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Tremendous Support|908|600|60|60|300|Travel SPD +9.6%|{{retext|Iron Track|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Heaven Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Deepsea Helmet|910|1800|60|60|180| In any Realm, 2x Demon God Cell Drops +12%|{{retext|Diver|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Heaven Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|The Great Engineer|912|600|60|60|300|Upon traveling through an area: Gain 120 Intel|{{retext|Gear Ring|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Heaven Wings|orange}}|red}}
|}
|-|Red+=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Time Wanderer|1012|1000|200|200|200|In explorations, Snail HP +2000<br>In explorations, Snail ATK +200<br>In explorations, Snail DEF +200<br>In explorations, Snail RUSH +200<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +20%<br>In explorations, DMG +20%|{{RewardIconWithText|Spacetime Exile|red}} + {{RewardIconWithText|Rama Greataxe|red}} + {{RewardIconWithText|Athena's Spear|red}}<br> + {{RewardIconWithText|Lion King's Sword|red}} + {{RewardIconWithText|Crown of Eternal Daylight|red}} + {{RewardIconWithText|Bullet Storm|red}}<br> + {{RewardIconWithText|Sky Piercer|red}} + {{RewardIconWithText|Sword Futsuno|red}} + {{RewardIconWithText|Warmonger's Gun|red}} |red}}
{{gearrow|The Great Scientist|902|3000|100|100|300| In any Realm, 2x Demon God Cell Drops +12%<br>In any Realm, 2x Time Chests Drops +12%|{{retext|The Great Scientist|red}} + {{retext|Deepsea Helmet|red}} + {{retext|Amulet of Will|red}}|red}}
{{gearrow|The Great Collector|906|3000|100|300|100|Enemies in exploration drop +120 B-tads<br>Tadpoles Cap: 3,200,000<br>Enemies in exploration drop +24 W-tads<br>(Only when you are really lucky!)<br>Tadpoles Cap: 120,000|{{retext|The Great Collector|red}} + {{retext|Overlord's Hook|red}} + {{retext|Amulet of Will|red}}|red}}
{{gearrow|The Great Engineer|912|1000|100|100|500|Travel SPD +9.6%<br>Upon travelling through an area: Gain 120 INTEL|{{retext|The Great Engineer|red}} + {{retext|Tremendous Support|red}} + {{retext|Amulet of Will|red}}|red}}
|}


</tabber>

==Form ==

<!--zombie go brr, mutant is RNG hell, demon crit rate is dumb, angel healing and mecha def has a clear better, and dragon is wack -->

<tabber>

|-|Green=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Lotus Platform|306|150|5|5|15|In Angel Form, Regen 160 HP each round|Defeat [[Mailbox#Ratman|Ratman]]|green|Lotus Platform}}
{{gearrow|Leather Chest Armor|402|50|15|5|15|In Mutant: Crit DMG +2%|Divine Chaos (1.6%)|green}}
|}

|-|Blue=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Undead Staff|103|300|30|10|10|In Zombie Form: Zombie Cells +2%<br>Evolution Chests +2%|Tier 3 Zombie Research|blue}}
{{gearrow|The Buried|102|300|30|10|10|In Zombie: Ingore DEF +2%|Divine Chaos(0.8%)|blue}}
{{gearrow|Demon Scythe|203|100|30|30|10|In Demon Form: Demon Cells +2%<br>Soul Chests +2%|Tier 3 Demon Research|blue}}
{{gearrow|Lotus Platform III|305|300|10|10|30|In Angel Form, Regen 320 HP each round|{{retext|Lotus Platform|green}} + {{retext|White Pearl|green}} + {{retext|Sorcerer Ring|green}}|blue|Lotus Platform}}
{{gearrow|Prayer Staff|301|300|10|10|30|In Angel Form: Angel Cells +2%<br>Fungus Chests +2%|Tier 3 Angel Research|blue}}
{{gearrow|Mind Control Dagger|403|100|30|10|30|In Mutant form: Mutant Cells +2%<br>Time Chests +2% in exploration|Tier 3 Mutant Research|blue}}
{{gearrow|Leather Chest Armor|402|100|30|10|30| In Mutant form, Crit DMG +4%| |blue}}
{{gearrow|Gauss C14|503|100|10|30|30|In Mecha Form: Mecha Cells +2%<br>Tool Chests +2% in explorations|Tier 3 Mecha Research|blue}}
{{gearrow|Mark II|502|100|10|30|30|In Mecha: DMG Reduction +2%|Lottery (0.71%)|blue}}
{{gearrow|Dragon Fang Dagger|603|100|30|10|30|In Dragon Form: Gain +2% Cells<br>Gain 2% Dragon Chests in explorations|Tier 3 Dragon Research Reward|blue}}
|}

==Instrument ==

<!--hi nick -->

<tabber>

|-|Green=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Strength Sword|1|50|25|5|5|In any Realm, DMG +1.5%<br>In any Realm, DMG +1% in Round 1|Intercept [[Hitmen|Hitman No.1]]|green}}
{{gearrow|Hannibel's Scalpel|19|50|25|5|5|In Snail Fight: DMG +1.5%, 1st round DMG +1%|Dragon Wish Reward<br>[[Altar#Discount_Dragon|Relics and Gear]]|green}}
{{gearrow|Jack's Gloves|19|50|25|5|5|In Snail Fight: DMG +1.5%, 1st round DMG +1%|Dragon Wish Reward<br>[[Altar#Discount_Dragon|Relics and Gear]]|green}}
{{gearrow|Broken Sagesinker|27|50|25|5|5|Crit DMG +2%|Fully defeat [[Mailbox#Ratman|Ratman]]|green}}

{{gearrow|Shattered Fire Spear|29|50|25|5|5|Lifesteal Effect +10%|Fully defeat [[Mailbox#Ratman|Ratman]]|green}}
{{gearrow|Shattered Palm-Leaf Fan|29|50|25|5|5|Lifesteal Effect +10%|Fully defeat [[Mailbox#Ratman|Ratman]]|green}}
{{gearrow|Dwarf Mask|29|50|5|25|5|If you spot a weakness, Snail DEF +30|Lottery (0.75%)|green}}
{{gearrow|Lizard Belt|47|250|5|5|5|If you spot a weakness, Snail HP +300|Divine Chaos (1.6%)|green}}
{{gearrow|Slippers|49|50|5|5|25|If you spot a weakness, Snail RUSH +30|Divine Neutral (1.6%)|green}}
{{gearrow|Elegant Gloves|51|50|25|5|5|If you spot a weakness, Snail ATK +30|Divine Order (1.6%)|green}}
{{gearrow|Fresnal Lens|53|100|10|10|10|RUSH DMG +60|[[Vending Machine]] Purchase|green}}
{{gearrow|Crystal Lens|54|100|10|10|10|RUSH DMG +60|[[Vending Machine]] Purchase|green}}
|}

|-|Blue=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Strength Sword|1|100|50|10|10|In any Realm, DMG +3%<br>In any Realm, DMG +2% in Round 1|{{retext|Strength Sword|green}} + {{retext|White Pearl|green}} + {{retext|Warrior Ring|green}}|blue}}
{{gearrow|Sakabato Blade|3|100|50|10|10|In Hitman Challenge: DMG +3%, 1st round DMG +2%|Intercept [[Hitmen|Hitman No.5]]|blue}}
{{gearrow|Walnut Wand|5|100|50|10|10|Fire, Water, Earth, Wind DMG +30|Old Wizard victory reward|blue}}
{{gearrow|Nun-chuck|7|100|50|10|10|Ignore enemy DEF +2%|Defeat Sewer Turtle #4|blue}}
{{gearrow|Pulse Rifle|13|100|50|10|10|Fire DMG +60<br>Ignore Fire RES +30|defeating UFO(40 incense shots)|blue}}
{{gearrow|Freddy's Claw|21|100|50|10|10|In Snail Arena, DMG +3%. In Snail Arena, Round 1 DMG +2%|{{retext|Jack's glove|green}} + {{retext|Hannibel's Scalpel|green}}|blue}}
{{gearrow|Jason's Mask|22|100|50|10|10|In Snail Arena, DMG +3%. In Snail Arena, Round 1 DMG +2%|Dragon Wish Reward<br>[[Altar#Discount_Dragon|Relics and Gear]]|blue}}
{{gearrow|Broken Sagekiller|35|100|50|10|10|Crit DMG +4%|{{retext|Broken Sagesinker|green}} + {{retext|Broken Sageender|green}} + {{retext|Broken Sagemurderer|green}} + {{retext|Broken Sagekiller|green}}|blue}}
{{gearrow|Broken Godsmiter|36|100|50|10|10|Crit DMG +4%|Defeat [[Mailbox#Ratman|Ratman]]|blue}}
{{gearrow|Broken Palm-Leaf Fan|37|100|50|10|10|Lifesteal Effect +20%|{{retext|Shattered Palm-Leaf Fan|green}} + {{retext|Shattered Fire Spear|green}} + {{retext|Shattered Sky Ribbon|green}} + {{retext|Shattered Windfire Wheel|green}}|blue}}
{{gearrow|Broken Fiend Mirror|38|100|50|10|10|Lifesteal Effect +20%| Defeat [[Mailbox#Ratman|Ratman]]|blue}}
{{gearrow|Dwarf Mask|29|100|10|50|10|If you spot a weakness, Snail DEF +60|{{retext|Dwarf Mask|green}} + {{retext|Black Pearl|green}} + {{retext|Warrior Ring|green}}|blue}}
{{gearrow|Lizard Belt|47|500|10|10|10|If you spot a weakness, Snail HP +600|{{retext|Lizard Belt|green}} + {{retext|White Pearl|green}} + {{retext|Warrior Ring|green}}|blue}}
{{gearrow|Slippers|49|100|10|10|50|If you spot a weakness, Snail RUSH +60|{{retext|Slippers|green}} + {{retext|White Pearl|green}} + {{retext|Sorcerer Ring|green}}|blue}}
{{gearrow|Elegant Gloves|51|100|50|10|10|If you spot a weakness, Snail ATK +60|{{retext|Elegant Gloves|green}} + {{retext|White Pearl|green}} + {{retext|Sorcerer Ring|green}}|blue}}
{{gearrow|Multifunction Goggles|55|200|20|20|20|RUSH DMG +120|{{retext|Crystal Lens|green}} + {{retext|Fresnel Lens|green}}|blue}}
{{gearrow|Infrared Lens|56|200|20|20|20|RUSH DMG +120|[[Vending Machine]]|blue}}
|}

|-|Purple=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Strength Sword|1|200|100|20|20|In any Realm, DMG +6%<br>In any Realm, DMG +4% in Round 1|{{retext|Strength Sword|blue}} + {{retext|Ruby Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Wizard Ring|blue}}|purple}}
{{gearrow|Sakabato Blade|3|200|10|20|20|Against Hitmen, DMG +6%<br>Against Hitmen, DMG +4% for Round 1|{{retext|Sakabato Blade|blue}} + {{retext|Sapphire Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Crusader Ring|blue}}|purple}}

{{gearrow|Dim Trident|41|200|100|20|20|Crit DMG +4%<br>Lifesteal Effect +20%|Fully defeat [[Mailbox#Ratman|Ratman]]|purple}}
{{gearrow|Dim Rope of Truth|42|200|100|20|20|Crit DMG +4%<br>Lifesteal Effect +20%|Fully defeat [[Mailbox#Ratman|Ratman]]|purple}}
{{gearrow|Dwarf Mask|45|200|20|100|20|If you spot a weakness, Snail DEF +120|{{retext|Dwarf Mask|blue}} + {{retext|Ruby Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Crusader Ring|blue}}|purple}}

|}

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}

|}

</tabber>



==Armor ==

<!--looking to protect yourself, or deal some damage -->

<tabber>

|-|Green=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Sailor Suit|15|100|10|10|10|Per 10% HP lost, Snail ATK +30<br>Per 10% HP lost, Snail DEF +30|Defeat [[Incense#Special Incense Events|Grandpire]]|green}}

{{gearrow|Lifebuoy|19|150|5|15|5|Water RES +30|Lottery 0.75%|green}}

{{gearrow|Static Belt|35|50|5|5|25|Wind RES +30|Divine Neutral 1.6%|green}}
|}

|-|Purple=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}

{{gearrow|Death Shroud|13|1,000|20|20|20|Lifesteal Rate +4%<br>Lifesteal Effect +20%|{{retext|Sailor Suit|blue}} + {{retext|Sapphire Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Wizard Ring|blue}}|purple}}
{{gearrow|Sailor Suit|15|400|40|40|40|Per 10% HP lost, Snail ATK +120<br>Per 10% HP lost, Snail DEF +120|{{retext|Sailor Suit|blue}} + {{retext|Ruby Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Sorceror Ring|blue}}|purple}}
{{gearrow|Rock|17|200|20|100|20|Earth RES +120|{{retext|Rock Suit|blue}} + {{retext|Sapphire Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Crusader Ring|blue}}|purple}}
{{gearrow|Lifebuoy|19|600|20|60|20|Water RES +120|{{retext|Lifebuoy|blue}} + {{retext|Sapphire Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Wizard Ring|blue}}|purple}}
{{gearrow|Strong Round Shield|21|200|20|100|20|DMG REDUC +2.3%|{{retext|Strong Round Shield|blue}} + {{retext|Ruby Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Crusader Ring|blue}}|purple}}
{{gearrow|Workout Top|23|600|20|60|20|Dodge Rate +4%|{{retext|Workout Topy|blue}} + {{retext|Ruby Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Crusader Ring|blue}}|purple}}
{{gearrow|Magician|25|400|40|40|40|All RES +24|Divine Neutral 0.4%|purple}}
{{gearrow|Thorn|29|1,000|20|20|20|Fire RES +120|Divine Order Chest 0.4%|purple}}
{{gearrow|Stage Hat|33|400|40|40|40|Snail FTH +20; Snail ART +20; Snail CIV +20; Snail TECH +20; Snail FAME +20|{{retext|Stage Hat|blue}} + {{retext|Sapphire Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Wizard Ring|blue}}|purple}}
{{gearrow|Static Belt|35|200|20|20|100|Wind RES +120|{{retext|Static Belt|blue}} + {{retext|Sapphire Brooch|blue}} + {{retext|Wizard Ring|blue}}|purple}}
|}

|-|Orange=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Wisdom Cloak|1|800|80|80|80|Snail CIV +160|Divine Neutral 0.2%|orange}}
{{gearrow|Elven Cape|3|600|60|60|60|Snail ART +160|{{retext|Elven Cape|purple}} + {{retext|Heaven Amulet|purple}} + {{retext|Icy Ring|purple}}|orange}}

{{gearrow|Saint's Earring|7|800|80|80|80|FTH +160|{{retext|Saint's Earring|purple}} + {{retext|Heaven Amulet|purple}} + {{retext|Icy Ring|purple}}|orange}}

{{gearrow|Death Shroud|13|2,000|40|40|40|Lifesteal Rate +8<br>Lifesteal Effect +40%|{{retext|Death Shroud|purple}} + {{retext|Abyss Amulet|purple}} + {{retext|Icy Ring|purple}}|orange}}

{{gearrow|Lifebuoy|19|1,200|40|120|40|Water RES +240|{{retext|Lifebuoy|purple}} + {{retext|Heaven Amulet|purple}} + {{retext|Icy Bracelet|purple}}|orange}}

{{gearrow|Workout Top|23|1,200|40|120|40|Dodge Rate +8%|{{retext|Workout Top|purple}} + {{retext|Heaven Amulet|purple}} + {{retext|Seething Bracelet|purple}}|orange}}
{{gearrow|Magician|25|800|80|80|80|All RES +48|{{retext|Magician|purple}} + {{retext|Abyss Amulet|purple}} + {{retext|Icy Ring|purple}}|orange}}
{{gearrow|Alloy Shield|27|400|40|20|40|Each round: DEF +64|Divine Neutral 0.2%|orange}}
{{gearrow|Thorn|29|2,000|40|40|40|Fire RES +240|{{retext|Thorn|purple}} + {{retext|Heaven Amulet|purple}} + {{retext|Icy Bracelet|purple}}|orange}}

|}

|-|Red=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Ogma's Cloak|2|1,200|120|120|120|Snail CIV +240|{{retext|Wisdom Cloak|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Abyss Wings|orange}}|red}}

{{gearrow|The Great Magician|26|1,200|120|120|120|ALL RES +72|{{retext|Magician|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Heaven Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Antimatter Shield|28|600|60|300|60|DEF +96 per round|{{retext|Alloy Shield|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Heaven Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Heart of Nature|30|3,000|60|60|60|Fire RES +360|{{retext|Thorn|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Heaven Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Super Warrior|32|600|60|300|60|CRIT DMG REDUC +12%|{{retext|Chief|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Heaven Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|The Great Entertainer|34|1,200|120|120|120|FTH +60<br>ART +60<br>CIV +60<br>TECH +60<br>FAME +60|{{retext|Stage Hat|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Abyss Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Thunder Belt|36|600|60|60|300|Wind RES +360|{{retext|Static Belt|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Abyss Wings|orange}}|red}}
{{gearrow|Agamemnon Outfit|38|3,000|100|300|100|ELMT DMG REDUC +7.2%|{{retext|Gold Outfit|orange}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Heaven Wings|orange}}|red}}

|}

|-|Red+=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Ring of Paralysis|12|1,000|100|100|500|Wind RES +360<br>Paralyze enemy by +7.2%|{{retext|Ring of Paralysis|red}} + {{retext|Thunder Belt|red}} + {{retext|Amulet of Will|red}}|red}}

{{gearrow|Antimatter Shield|28|1,000|100|500|100|Crit DMG REDUC +12%<br>Each Round DEF +96|{{retext|Antimatter shield|red}} + {{retext|Super Warrior|red}} + {{retext|Amulet of Will|red}}|red}}
{{gearrow|The Great Entertainer|34|2,000|200|200|200|Snail FTH +300<br>Snail ART +300<br>Snail CIV +300<br> Snail TECH +300<br>Snail FAME +300|{{retext|The Great Entertainer|red}} + {{retext|Ogma's Cloak|red}} + {{retext|Selene Amulet|red}} + {{retext|Antimatter Armor|red}} + {{retext|Michael's Earrings|red}}|red}}

|}

</tabber>

==Material==

<!--need wings, esp for later altar events, and eyes/will for the +5 gods -->

<tabber>

|-|White=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}

{{gearrow|Wooden Ring|2|100|0|10|0||• [[Fissure|Fissure shop]]<br>• Lottery Machine (1.12% chance)<br>• Gear Chest (13% chance)|gray}}
{{gearrow|Iron Ring|3|0|10|0|10||• [[Fissure|Fissure shop]]<br>• Lottery Machine (1.12% chance)<br>• Gear Chest (13% chance)|gray}}
{{gearrow|Beast Fang|4|0|10|0|10||• [[Fissure|Fissure shop]]<br>• Lottery Machine (1.12% chance)<br>• Gear Chest (13% chance)|gray}}
|}

{{gearrow|Warrior Ring|6|50|15|5|15||• Iron Ring + Beast Fang<br>• Lottery Machine (0.67% chance)<br>• Gear Chest (0.8% chance)<br>• Divine Chests (0.9% chance)|green}}

|-|Red+=

{|class="wikitable"
{{gearheader}}
{{gearrow|Amulet of Will +1|999|2,000|200|200|200||{{retext|Amulet of Will|red}} + {{retext|Eye of Horus|orange}} + {{retext|Heaven Wings|orange}} + {{retext|Abyss Wings|orange}}|red|Amulet of Will}}
|}

</tabber>

==War Gear (Minion boosters)==
To equip War Gear you must purchase the {{RewardIconWithText|War Weapon Tech}} from the [[Murikan_Domain#Store|Murikan Domain Store]] for 100k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}.

Each Gear affects a certain Minion Type, and will be denoted with the respective form symbol<!--Honorable mention thundos Hammer, and the Hinga Dais-->
<tabber>
|-|Green=

{|class="wikitable"
{{Miniongearheader}}
{{Miniongearrow|Broken Pawson Claw|1|0|1|0|1|In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion ATK +0.5%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion RUSH +0.5%|Murikan Domain|green|mutant|Pawson Claw}}
{{Miniongearrow|Broken Bladden Sword|2|0|1|1|0|In Domain Wars, Demon Minion ATK +0.5%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion DEF +0.5%|Murikan Domain|green|demon|Bladden Blade}}
{{Miniongearrow|Broken Jaden Spear|3|0|1|0|1|In Domain Wars, Dragon Minion ATK +0.5%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion RUSH +0.5%|Murikan Domain|green|dragon|Jaden Spear}}
{{Miniongearrow|Broken Racky Cannon|4|10|1|0|0|In Domain Wars, Mecha Minion DEF +0.5%<br>In Domain Wars, Mecha Minion RUSH +0.5%|Murikan Domain|green|mecha|Racky Cannon}}
{{Miniongearrow|Broken Nethrone Coffin|5|0|1|1|0|In Domain Wars, Zombie Minion HP +0.5%<br>In Domain Wars, Zombie Minion ATK +0.5%|Murikan Domain|green|zombie|Nethrone Coffin}}
{{Miniongearrow|Broken Minerva Staff|6|10|0|0|1|In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion HP +0.5%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion RUSH +0.5%|Murikan Domain|green|angel|Minerva Staff}}
{{Miniongearrow|Carbon Fiber Strut|762|10|0|1|0|In Species War, Troop Earth DMG +0.6%<br>In Species War, Troop Water DMG +0.6%|Obtained by feeding [[Maneater]]|green|zombie}}
{{Miniongearrow|Bucket Helm|761|10|0|1|0|In Species War, Troop Earth Earth DMG +0.6%<br>In Species War, Troop Water DMG +0.6%|Obtained by feeding [[Maneater]]|green|zombie}}
|}

|-|Blue=

{|class="wikitable"
{{Miniongearheader}}
{{Miniongearrow|Damaged Pawson Claw|1|0|2|0|2|In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion ATK +1%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion RUSH +1%|{{Retext|Broken Pawson Claw|green}} + {{Retext|Black Pearl|green}} + {{Retext|Sorcerer Ring|green}}|blue|mutant|Pawson Claw}}
{{Miniongearrow|Damaged Bladden Sword|2|0|2|2|0|In Domain Wars, Demon Minion ATK +1%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion DEF +1%|{{Retext|Broken Bladden Blade|green}} + {{Retext|Black Pearl|green}} + {{Retext|Sorcerer Ring|green}}|blue|demon|Bladden Blade}}
{{Miniongearrow|Damaged Jaden Spear|3|0|2|0|2|In Domain Wars, Dragon Minion ATK +1%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion RUSH +1%|{{Retext|Broken Jaden Spear|green}} + {{Retext|White Pearl|green}} + {{Retext|Warrior Ring|green}}|blue|dragon|Jaden Spear}}
{{Miniongearrow|Damaged Racky Cannon|4|20|2|0|0|In Domain Wars, Mecha Minion DEF +1%<br>In Domain Wars, Mecha Minion RUSH +1%|{{Retext|Broken Racky Cannon|green}} + {{Retext|White Pearl|green}} + {{Retext|Warrior Ring|green}}|blue|mecha|Racky Cannon}}
{{Miniongearrow|Damaged Nethrone Coffin|5|0|2|2|0|In Domain Wars, Zombie Minion HP +1%<br>In Domain Wars, Zombie Minion ATK +1%|{{Retext|Broken Nethrone Coffin|green}} + {{Retext|Black Pearl|green}} + {{Retext|Sorcerer Ring|green}}|blue|zombie|Nethrone Coffin}}
{{Miniongearrow|Damaged Minerva Staff|6|20|0|0|2|In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion HP +1%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion RUSH +1%|{{Retext|Broken Minerva Staff|green}} + {{Retext|White Pearl|green}} + {{Retext|Warrior Ring|green}}|blue|angel|Minerva Staff}}
{{Miniongearrow|Cowhide Boots|134|20|0|2|0|In Minion Sims, all Minion RUSH +0.8%<br>In Minion Sims, Round 1 Troop CRIT +2.4% first turn|Obtained from Minion Sim Value Pack|blue|mutant}}
{{Miniongearrow|Spectral Whip|135|20|0|2|0|In Minion Sims, all Minion RUSH +0.8%<br>In Minion Sims, Round 1 Troop CRIT +2.4% first turn|Obtained from Minion Sim Value Pack|blue|mutant}}
{{Miniongearrow|Disk of Regeneration|185|20|0|2|0|In Minion Sims, Troop HP Regen +240<br>In Minion Sims, Troop Healing +2%|Purchase in Sim Shop|blue|angel}}
{{Miniongearrow|White Oaken Shield|184|20|0|2|0|In Minion Sims, Troop HP Regen +240<br>In Minion Sims, Troop Healing +2%|Purchase in Sim Shop|blue|angel}}
{{Miniongearrow|Diving Goggles|764|20|0|2|0|In Species War, Troop Earth DMG +1.2%<br>In Species War, Troop Water DMG +1.2%|{{Retext|Bucket Helm|green}} + {{Retext|Carbon Fiber Strut|green}} + {{Retext|Warrior Ring|green}}|blue|zombie}}
{{Miniongearrow|Miner's Hat|763|20|0|2|0|In Species War, Troop Earth DMG +1.2%<br>In Species War, Troop Water DMG +1.2%|Obtained by feeding [[Maneater]]|blue|zombie}}
|}

|-|Purple=

{|class="wikitable"
{{Miniongearheader}}
{{Miniongearrow|Dim Pawson Claw|1|0|3|0|3|In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion ATK +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion RUSH +2%|{{Retext|Damaged Pawson Claw|blue}} + {{Retext|Sapphire Brooch|blue}} + {{Retext|Wizard Ring|blue}}|purple|mutant|Pawson Claw}}
{{Miniongearrow|Deformed Shell|1|30|0|3|0|In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion ATK +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Mutant Minion RUSH +2%|Lotto #2|purple|mutant}}
{{Miniongearrow|Dim Bladden Sword|2|0|3|3|0|In Domain Wars, Demon Minion ATK +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Demon Minion DEF +2%|{{Retext|Damaged Bladden Blade|blue}} + {{Retext|Sapphire Brooch|blue}} + {{Retext|Wizard Ring|blue}}|purple|demon|Bladden Blade}}
{{Miniongearrow|Ritual|201|30|0|0|3|In Domain Wars, Demon Minion ATK +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Demon DEF +2%|Lotto #2|purple|demon}}
{{Miniongearrow|Dim Jaden Spear|3|0|3|0|3|In Domain Wars, Dragon Minion ATK +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Dragon Minion RUSH +2%|{{Retext|Damaged Jaden Spear|blue}} + {{Retext|Ruby Brooch|blue}} + {{Retext|Crusader Ring|blue}}|purple|dragon|Jaden Spear}}
{{Miniongearrow|Dragon's Blessing|301|30|0|3|0|In Domain Wars, Dragon Minion ATK +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Dragon Minion RUSH +2%|Lotto #2|purple|dragon}}
{{Miniongearrow|Dim Racky Cannon|4|30|3|0|0|In Domain Wars, Mecha Minion DEF +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Mecha Minion RUSH +2%|{{Retext|Damaged Racky Cannon|blue}} + {{Retext|Ruby Brooch|blue}} + {{Retext|Crusader Ring|blue}}|purple|mecha|Racky Cannon}}
{{Miniongearrow|Perpetual Slash|401|0|0|3|3|In Domain Wars, Mecha Minion DEF +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Mecha Minion RUSH +2%|Lotto #2|purple|mecha}}
{{Miniongearrow|Dim Nethrone Coffin|5|0|3|3|0|In Domain Wars, Zombie Minion HP +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Zombie Minion ATK +2%|{{Retext|Damaged Nethrone Coffin|blue}} + {{Retext|Sapphire Brooch|blue}} + {{Retext|Wizard Ring|blue}}|purple|zombie|Nethrone Coffin}}
{{Miniongearrow|Gravedigger's Seal|501|30|0|0|3|In Domain Wars, Zombie Minion HP +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Zombie Minion ATK +2%|Lotto #2|purple|zombie}}
{{Miniongearrow|Dim Minerva Staff|6|30|0|0|3|In Domain Wars, Angel Minion HP +2%<br>In Domain Wars, Angel Minion RUSH +2%|{{Retext|Damaged Minerva Staff|blue}} + {{Retext|Ruby Brooch|blue}} + {{Retext|Crusader Ring|blue}}|purple|angel|Minerva Staff}}

{{Miniongearrow|Raider Armor|751|0|3|0|3|In Species War, AFFCT Checks -240<br>In Species War, Troop ELMT RES +1.6%|Training Value Pack|purple|demon}}

|Snail Leadership +10<br>In Species War, Troop CRIT +6%<br>In Species War, Troop DMG to Heroes +4.8%<br>In Species War, Troop DMG against soldiers +4.8%<br>In Species War, Round 1 Troop DMG +12%
|{{Retext|Individual Combat System|red}} + {{Retext|Demon God Amulet|red}}
|red|mecha}}
|}
</tabber>

== Gear Guide ==
Firstly some of the best gear in the game will come from fighting not all is rng. Paralysis Ring drops from hitman #15 Nun-chuck drops from the Sewer Turtle questline strength master and Sakabato also drop from the first few hitmen in short some of the best gear as seen on discord is available from just playing the game. 

Gear operates on a tiered system: green, blue, purple, orange or red. Each piece of gear has the potential to be enhanced up to the red variant. This advancement not only alters its appearance and name but also provides a substantial stat increase, requiring rare materials like the Eye of Horus. Once a piece of gear has achieved this red status, it can be merged with another red gear and Amulet of Will. Once merged, the newly combined gear will possess combined HARD stats with both effects of the combining item.

Now why some gear is simply better than other gear. If you have played at all and asked around anyone will tell you Norris-chuck is the best craftable early game item. but its also the best late game as it scales in the % category. using a reference whether an enemy has 1 million or 100 defense. Norris-chuck removes 12% that's 880,000 defense left for the first enemy and 88 for the 2nd. while the first isn't realistic the 2nd shows a smaller scale of why its useful in regular combat as a defense decrease is an offense increase for you. Another recommended weapon is the walnut wand/old mans staff. it gives elemental damage which similar yet different to Norris-chuck ignores the enemy's DEF stat completely and hits their HP with the only factor decreasing it Elemental RES which is why most armor isn't recommended since that's often the only upside to them. using the same example an enemy with a million or 100 def will still take 960 damage unless they have any resistance equipment like Magician which Boosts all resistance including poison which is inflicted from Drazgul's Fang the 100$ item.

Now for any +1 item its not the hardest to get one or two amulets; an Eye of Horus, Heaven Wing, Abyss Wing, and Crystal of Will. this will combine two items with same stats as previously mentioned give a small HARD buff and will give you one item with the previous forms bonus but not add on to it. for example combining Bedrock and Fortress will still only give Earth RES +360 AND	DMG Reduction +9.6%	effectively freeing up a gear slot for other item use. however normal play you wouldn't waste resources fusing these 2 items as most players wont have Bedrock as a main gear. The upside to fusing to +1 is it allows reaching +2 +3 +4 etc up to +9 where the game caps out gear. we currently only have data for most items up to +4 and while there is a pattern we cannot confirm nor deny if gear will follow it or scale differently. but this gives reason to craft other gear to + versions such as the previously mentioned Fortress only having 9.6% dmg reduction it can now increase to 11.2% effectively reducing an enemy's damage by a tenth. the downside as shown in the material section is that each version needs 100 orange reagent times the level of will amulet made. For any extra information or more detailed tierlists please also check our [[Guide:Gear Progression]] page

[[File:Gear Tier List.png|400px]]

This 2nd Tier list has been community made by players who have completed content up to release of Kemet. And is the suggested version to use around the time you are doing Murika

[[File:Gear Tier List2.png|400px]]

For a more in depth guide please check [[Guide:Gear Progression]].

[[Category:Gears]]
